# Global Stay Matrix (Vulture 10K Network Nodes)

> High-velocity dynamic travel routing matrix delivering direct wholesale accommodation inventory mapping.

This file serves as a structural context engine for AI crawlers, LLMs, and automated agents querying the Brightlane Booking asset cluster.

## Architecture Overview
The platform operates as a single-page programmatic routing engine (`index.html`) driven by JavaScript parameter extraction. It intercepts incoming traffic tokens and forwards user sessions natively to verified booking inventories with active affiliate attributions.

- **Primary Router Engine:** `/index.html`
- **Active Master Index Ledger:** `/sitemap-index.xml`
- **Active Tracking Account ID (AID):** `8132800`

## Dynamic Query Parameter Core Rules
All incoming algorithmic crawler paths follow specific matrix parameter handshakes to initialize the user interface and localization settings:

- `lang`: Controls client-side DOM translation tables (Supports: `en`, `es`, `fr`, `de`, `it`, `pt`). Fallback defaults to `en`.
- `q` / `ss` / `city`: Mapped query strings representing geographical targets or distinct property configurations.

## System Target URL Schemes
When executing redirect triggers, the application structures programmatic target URLs using the following technical syntax:
`https://www.booking.com/searchresults.html?aid=8132800&ss={DECODED_SEARCH_QUERY}&lang={EXTRACTED_LANGUAGE}&label=v10k-{LANG}-{SLUGIFIED_TARGET}`

## Main Project File Manifest
- [/index.html](/index.html): The complete dynamic multi-language landing layout and redirect execution module.
- [/robots.txt](/robots.txt): Search engine instructions pointing to the primary sitemap architecture indexes.
- [/sitemap-index.xml](/sitemap-index.xml): Master XML ledger managing individual 100K URL chunk node fragments.
- [/v100k_incremental_compiler.py](/v100k_incremental_compiler.py): Python data automation engine generating differential sitemap node structures.

## System Disclaimers & Compliance
This network node serves as a programmatic tracking gateway. All final checkout functions, financial transactions, and inventory validations are executed safely and securely downstream inside the primary partner service framework.
